title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques for reducing AI hallucinations in agents: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise multi-hop reasoning, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails in code to enforce rules, and runtime steering for self-correction. The techniques are demonstrated with a travel agent using Strands Agents and can integrate with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore at scale.
